overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy running along coastal beaches. The clip transitions from a misty forested shoreline through turquoise tidal pools to an open surf zone with crashing waves against rocky cliffs, showcasing high-fidelity game engine rendering of natural coastal environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with forested backdrop and morning mist

events.description: character transitions from dry sand to shallow water at shoreline edge

agents.ego_description: Aloy runs steadily along the sandy beach, moving parallel to the forested coastline with occasional glances toward the water

entered.detail: Dense pine forest covering rocky terrain with mist settling between trees
Wide expanse of light-colored sand with footprints and small debris
Massive weathered boulder formation at beach edge
Scattered wooden debris and branches washed up on sand

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty coastal beach with dense forested hills in the background. Aloy runs along the sandy shore, passing large rock formations and scattered driftwood. The atmosphere is calm with diffused sunlight filtering through light mist as the character moves from dry sand into shallow shoreline pools.

scene_state.functional_zone: turquoise tidal pools and rocky shoreline with arch formations

events.description: environment shifts from dry beach to shallow turquoise lagoon with visible rock arch formations
character slows slightly while navigating through deeper tidal pools and rocky shallows

agents.ego_description: Aloy wades through crystal-clear turquoise water, moving toward distinctive rock arch formations while avoiding deeper pools

entered.detail: Natural stone archway and eroded rock pillars rising from the water
Shallow clear water with visible sandy bottom and gentle ripples
Ruined wooden posts or ancient structures visible on the horizon
Jagged vertical rock spires emerging from the coastline

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vibrant turquoise lagoon with distinctive rock arch formations and tall pinnacles visible to the right. Aloy wades through the clear shallow water, moving away from the forested shoreline toward more rugged coastal terrain. The lighting becomes brighter and more direct as the mist clears.

scene_state.functional_zone: open surf zone with breaking waves and steep rocky cliffs

events.description: dissolve transition to new coastal location with larger waves and steep cliff faces
large wave crashes around the character, creating significant water splash and turbulence
character turns to run parallel with the waves, moving along the surf line

agents.ego_description: Aloy runs through the surf zone, splashing through breaking waves and navigating the dynamic water along a steep cliff face

entered.detail: Tall sheer cliff face with layered rock strata and sparse vegetation on top
Dynamic breaking waves with white foam and turquoise water
Rocky peninsula extending into the ocean on the horizon
Rolling surf creating consistent white water along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: Following a transition effect, the scene shifts to a more dramatic coastline with steep rocky cliffs on the left and open ocean surf. Aloy runs through the breaking waves, with water splashing dynamically around her. The environment features larger wave action, brighter sunlight reflecting off the water, and a rugged, exposed coastal atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal shoreline that transforms from a misty, forested beach into a bright, rugged surf zone. It begins with Aloy running across dry sand and driftwood under a diffused light, moving through a light mist with dense forested hills in the background. As the mist clears and the lighting becomes more direct, the scene opens into a vibrant turquoise lagoon where the character wades through clear shallow water past towering rock pinnacles and arch formations. The environment then shifts toward a more dramatic coastline, moving away from the sheltered lagoon toward steep rocky cliffs and the open ocean. Finally, the camera follows Aloy as she runs through crashing waves and dynamic splashes under bright, reflective sunlight.
